title: Skiathos Short Final
subtitle: LGSK 01 · 3.5 NM on 3° path · A330 · 20 kt right crosswind
description: Iconic short-runway approach into Alexandros Papadiamantis (Skiathos / JSI). Spawn on extended centerline ~3.5 NM from RWY 01 threshold at elev+dist×318 ft (nominal 3°), sea approach toward the 1,628 m strip. Nice VMC with a steady 20 kt wind from the right of the aircraft (~104° true — pure right cross). Short length and upslope demand a precise, low, firm touchdown. Start/Restart leaves the sim paused after settle — unpause when ready.
hudTips: Start free flight in A330-200 (RR) first — Challenge Lab will not hot-swap aircraft.
After Start/Restart you stay PAUSED at spawn — press GO on the HUD when ready to fly.
Start config: gear up, flaps 0, spoilers in, parking brake off. Set landing flaps on approach.
LGSK 01 is only 1,628 m with an upslope — plan a firm touchdown early and manage energy.
Wind 100/20: pure right cross from ~104° true. Crab on final; kick straight before touchdown.
Edit spawn / timeOfDay / weather in this JSON, then restart the challenge.
